rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §21.4511 governs professional development grants from appropriated funds. It does not reference homestead exemptions or property tax revenue, so increasing the §11.13(b) exemption does not affect this statute.
quote: From funds appropriated for that purpose in an amount not to exceed $2.5 million each year, the commissioner may develop and award grants to school districts, regional education service centers, nonprofit organizations, and institutions of higher education for establishing and providing technical assistance and professional development activities in the staff development training of public school teachers and administrators.
_note: No direct or indirect statutory linkage between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this professional development grant statute.
